steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Rhetorical Synthesis question. The student's goal is to "provide an example of a poem by Johnson," so the correct choice must name a specific poem. The notes confirm "Old Things" is a poem by Johnson published in March 1923.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Johnson was an African American poet, educator, and minister.': describes Johnson's occupations but names no poem. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Johnson published poetry in a literary magazine called The Crisis.': tells us where he published but does not name any specific poem. ✗
  • Choice C — 'One example of a poem by Johnson is "Old Things" (1923).': directly names a poem by Johnson, fulfilling the goal exactly. ✓
  • Choice D — 'The Crisis is an influential Black literary magazine that has published poetry.': describes the magazine, not a poem by Johnson. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
